videoSnippet.title: Chess is Simple - We Just Make it Complicated || Alireza vs Gukesh || Norway Chess 2026
videoSnippet.description:

Firouzja, Alireza (2759) - Gukesh D (2732)
Norway Chess 2026 (Chess.com) [15] 2026.06.02
D38 Queen's Gambit Declined, Ragozin variation

1.d4 Nf6 2.c4 e6 3.Nf3 d5 4.Nc3 Bb4 5.cxd5 exd5 6.Bf4 Ne4 7.Rc1 Bf5 8.e3 g5 9.Bg3 Bxc3+ 10.bxc3 h5 11.Qb3 O-O 12.Qxb7 c6 13.Qc7 Nd7 14.Qxd8 Raxd8 15.Nd2 Nxg3 16.hxg3 Nf6 17.Nb3 Rb8 18.Be2 Kg7 19.Bd1 Rfc8 20.O-O a5 21.Bc2 Bxc2 22.Rxc2 a4 23.Nc5 a3 24.Nb3 Ne4 25.c4 c5 26.Rfc1 cxd4 27.exd4 dxc4 28.Rxc4 Rxc4 29.Rxc4 Kf6 30.Rc6+ Ke7 31.Kf1 Kd7 32.Ra6 Rc8 33.Rxa3 Rc2 34.Nc5+ Nxc5 35.dxc5 Rxc5 36.Rd3+ Ke6 37.Re3+ Kd6 38.a4 Kc6 39.Rf3 f5 40.Re3 Ra5 41.Ra3 Kc5 42.Ke2 Kb4 43.Ra1 Re5+ 44.Kd3 Rd5+ 45.Ke2 Re5+ 46.Kf1 Kb3 47.a5 Kb2 48.Ra4 Kb3 49.f4 Rd5 50.Ra1 Kb2 51.Re1 Rxa5 52.Re5 Ra1+ 53.Kf2 Kc3 54.fxg5 Kd4 55.Rxf5 Ke4 56.Rb5 Rd1 57.g4 h4 58.Rf5 Rd2+ 59.Kg1 Rd3 60.g6 Rd7 61.Kh2
